title: cleidion marginatum
intro: Cleidion marginatum, also known as the Mountain Cleidion, is a plant species that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Cleidion marginatum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting relaxation. Cleidion marginatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
